testName: Netstorming QueryOrder API - Success After Fix
issue: QueryOrder API was using <booking code="..."/> instead of <booking name="..."/>
fix: Changed QueryOrderBooking struct from Code to Name attribute

response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<envelope>
    <header>
        <version port="4002" host="ns002test.cloud.netstorming.net">1.7.2</version>
        <timestamp>20260305102802</timestamp>
    </header>
    <response type="track" product="hotel">
        <supplier code="NS">Netstorming</supplier>
        <booking code="B0326G3TXZ"/>
        <invoiced/>
        <status code="cnf">Confirmed</status>
        <checkin date="2026-03-07"/>
        <checkout date="2026-03-09"/>
        <city code="VCEI"/>
        <hotel code="305592" agreement="LCL.10000040" ctype="tsu"/>
        <reference code="B0326G3TXZ"/>
        <currency code="USD"/>
        <roombasis meal="RO" breakfast="false"/>
        <deadline date="2026-03-05"/>
        <nationality code="CN"/>
        <details>
            <room type="tsu">
                <pax title="Mr" initial="T" surname="Adult1" leader="true" age="30"/>
                <prices>
                    <roomprice nett="5900.00" gross="5900.00">
                        <bydate from="2026-03-07" nett="5900.00"/>
                    </roomprice>
                </prices>
            </room>
        </details>
    </response>
</envelope>

summary: QueryOrder API is now fully functional after fixing the booking element attribute from 'code' to 'name'.
